ORDER OF THE COURT (CAL. CODE OF CIVIL PROC. 664.6)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS HEREBY ORDERED, ADJUDGED, AND DECREED THAT DEFENDANTS OKAMOTO AND OWYANG ARE DEEMED TO HAVE ABANDONED THE PROPERTY LOCATED AT 170 WOOD STREET, UNIT 1, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA ("PROPERTY"), AS OF 11:59P.M., ON APRIL 3, 2023. THE SOLE REMAINING CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF IS NOW MOOT; ACCORDINGLY, THE ACTION IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE IN ITS ENTIRTY. THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT DID NOT ADDRESS PREVAILING PARTY NOR COSTS. THE COURT MAY ONLY ENFORCE TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT. THEREFORE, EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS INCURRED IN THE ACTION. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
